title: riff configuration
description: Configuration file for riff — a CLI tool for managing throwaway projects. Place this file at ~/.riff/config.json.

$schema.description: URL to the JSON schema for editor validation.

ai_provider.description: Preferred AI provider for generating project descriptions. Set to "claude" for Claude Code or "copilot" for GitHub Copilot CLI. Leave empty or omit to auto-detect (Claude Code is preferred when both are available).

templates.description: Custom project templates. Each key is the template name used with `riff new <name>`. User-defined templates with the same name as a built-in template override it.

command.description: Shell command to initialize the project. Runs via `sh -c` in the new project directory.
